case_title: JEFFERSON, YOLANDA et al VS LEVITZ FURNITURE CORPORATION DBA LEVITZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON, YOLANDA MCMONICO, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEVITZ FURNITURE CORPORATION DBA LEVITZ $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $540.00, THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT PLAINTIFF'S OBLIGATION TO DEFENDANT UNDER ACCOUNT NO. 720-6011-8534 IS FULLY SATISFIED, AND NO FURTHER PAYMENT IS DUE THEREON. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
